guardrails: W1.5.208 records A4 reviewer decisions for the 11 W1.5.207 pending review inputs without claiming acceptance.
Every W1.5.208 decision is needs_followup because the existing evidence is review-ready but not sufficient formal UX acceptance.

No decision field may contain raw prompts, raw model output, uploaded-file bytes, query/hash secrets, response bodies, artifact bodies, secure paths, cache paths, output directory values, full destination paths, prompt_to_user, or custom_value content.
FR-015 remains excluded until ADR-0012 or another accepted restore/continue contract exists.
EXIT-P1-1 remains not_ready and accepted_items remains zero.

reviewer_contract.reviewer_source: independent A4 review of the W1.5.207 decision handoff inputs

decision_items.rationale: The capture proves collapsed-state mechanics, but first-viewport A4 acceptance and phase-level UX recording are still missing.
follow_up_refs: Capture reviewer-facing first-viewport UX evidence for the default collapsed stream panel.
Record explicit A4 acceptance or rejection after the phase-level UX capture.
acceptance_blockers: A4 reviewer has not recorded first-viewport collapsed stream acceptance.
Phase-level UX recording is still missing.

decision_items.review_focus: Expanded stream panel content and event detail readability
decision_items.rationale: The evidence covers expanded detail mechanics, but real workflow stream evidence and A4 acceptance of the event taxonomy remain absent.
follow_up_refs: Capture expanded stream behavior against real or fixture-backed workflow events.
Record A4 acceptance or rejection for the full expanded event taxonomy.
acceptance_blockers: A4 reviewer has not accepted the full expanded event taxonomy as an end-user path.
Real workflow stream demo evidence is still missing.

decision_items.review_focus: StreamEvent classification labels and unknown-event fallback
decision_items.rationale: Known and unknown event fallback evidence exists, but final user-facing labels and phase-level demo stream acceptance are not recorded.
follow_up_refs: Prepare final StreamEvent user-facing labels for A4 review.
Capture phase-level stream evidence that demonstrates the labels in context.
acceptance_blockers: A4 reviewer has not accepted final user-facing labels for every event class.
Phase-level demo stream evidence is still missing.

decision_items.review_focus: Execution mode control placement and run-once dispatch behavior
decision_items.rationale: Placement and dispatch metadata are present, but backend run-once success from the workbench and A4 UX acceptance are not proven.
follow_up_refs: Add backend run-once execution success evidence from the desktop workbench.
Capture A4 UX evidence for mode control placement and behavior.
acceptance_blockers: Backend run-once execution success has not been proven end-to-end from the desktop workbench.
A4 UX acceptance evidence for execution mode placement and behavior is not recorded.

decision_items.review_focus: Runtime-backed Chat instruction routing for current node and global Workflow scopes
decision_items.rationale: Runtime-backed routing is evidenced, but the current-node/global Workflow UX path lacks A4 acceptance and project-backed command history remains out of scope.
follow_up_refs: Capture A4 reviewer-visible current-node and Workflow Chat instruction paths.
Keep project-backed command history separate unless an accepted follow-up implements it.
acceptance_blockers: A4 UX acceptance evidence for the runtime-backed current-node/global Workflow Chat instruction path is not recorded.
Project-backed command history and persistence remain outside this evidence refresh and must not be inferred from local receipt metadata.

decision_items.review_focus: Combined project creation and initial reference import user path
decision_items.rationale: The combined create-and-import command path is represented, but full new-project UX acceptance evidence is still not recorded.
follow_up_refs: Capture the full workbench new-project path with initial reference import.
Record A4 acceptance or rejection after the reviewer-visible capture.
acceptance_blockers: A4 UX acceptance evidence for the full new-project path is not recorded.

decision_items.review_focus: Mandatory Git initialization evidence in desktop project creation
decision_items.rationale: Mandatory Git metadata exists, but A8 git-history audit and A4 acceptance of the mandatory Git path are both missing.
follow_up_refs: Prepare A8 git-history audit evidence for automatic commit and tag behavior.
Capture A4 UX evidence that project creation cannot bypass Git initialization.
acceptance_blockers: A8 git-history audit evidence for automatic commit/tag behavior is not recorded.
A4 UX acceptance evidence for the mandatory Git path is not recorded.

decision_items.review_focus: Reference import, list, enable, disable, and view user paths
decision_items.rationale: Runtime-backed reference actions are evidenced, but A4 UX evidence for import/list/enable/disable/view user paths has not been recorded.
follow_up_refs: Capture reviewer-facing reference import, list, enable, disable, and view paths.
Keep delete semantics excluded until an accepted spec defines them.
acceptance_blockers: A4 UX acceptance evidence for reference import, enable, disable, and view user paths is not recorded.
Delete semantics remain intentionally out of scope until accepted spec material defines them.

decision_items.review_focus: Selected-node Task Drawer artifact detail display and safe native open/download handoff
decision_items.rationale: Selected-node artifact metadata and safe handoff are evidenced, but node artifact detail and open/download UX acceptance are not recorded.
follow_up_refs: Capture selected-node Task Drawer artifact detail display.
Capture safe native open/download behavior as a reviewer-visible UX path.
acceptance_blockers: A4 UX acceptance evidence for node artifact detail display and safe open/download behavior is not recorded.

decision_items.review_focus: Skill candidate discovery and secret-safe MCP configuration display
decision_items.rationale: Runtime-backed skill and secret-safe MCP metadata are evidenced, but A4 UX acceptance for the Skill configuration display is still missing.
follow_up_refs: Capture reviewer-facing Skill candidate discovery and configuration display.
Verify secret-safe MCP metadata presentation remains visible without raw command or secret values.
acceptance_blockers: A4 UX acceptance evidence for secret-safe Skill configuration display is not recorded.

decision_items.review_focus: High-risk HITL pause/resume review context and sanitized pending decision controls
decision_items.rationale: High-risk HITL metadata is safely projected, but A4 UX evidence for actual pause/resume behavior is not recorded.
follow_up_refs: Capture high-risk HITL pause and resume as a reviewer-visible UX path.
Keep evidence metadata-only and continue excluding prompt_to_user and custom_value content.
acceptance_blockers: A4 UX acceptance evidence for high-risk HITL pause/resume behavior is not recorded.

next_recommended_slices.title: A4 needs-followup repair plan
next_recommended_slices.reason: Turn the 11 W1.5.208 needs_followup decisions into scoped repair or capture tasks while keeping FR-015 blocked until ADR-0012 or another accepted contract is available.
